records.raw_text: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Every validator MUST have documented thresholds and associated failure modes in failure_mode_library.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Prompt sensitivity and cross-run stability MUST be measured explicitly for all judge and scoring subsystems.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Template echo detection MUST run on any output produced under few-shot or example-based prompting regimes.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: All evaluation components MUST map to entries in evaluation_library, benchmark_fixture_library, failure_mode_library, voice_library, and cadence_library.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Configure evaluators (LLM-judges, discriminators, metrics) to run with greedy decoding and fixed seeds to ensure deterministic behavior.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: For any change to prompts, rubrics, or fixtures, record a new version identifier and run prompt sensitivity and stability checks.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Monitor style consistency dashboards to detect unexpected voice drift across releases.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Apply template echo detector to sample batches for each major prompt or fine-tune version, adjusting thresholds using benchmark fixtures.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Maintain and periodically expand benchmark_fixture_library with newly observed real-world failure examples.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Use regression tests to block deployments where stability improves but agreement with human or reference metrics degrades.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Detector overfit to superficial artifacts misclassifies human text as AI or vice versa.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: LLM-as-judge exhibits prompt sensitivity, self-preference, and rubric drift, masking true quality.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Narrative coherence benchmarks are gamed via checklist inclusion, not genuine plot logic.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: State-tracking continuity checker cascades extraction errors and reports false contradictions.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style drift detector flags intentional stylistic shifts (e.g., POV changes) as regressions.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Template echo detector misclassifies genre-typical structures as template copies.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Stability metrics report "stable but wrong" patterns where outputs are consistent yet misaligned with references or human judgment.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Memory benchmarks encourage benchmark-specific pattern learning instead of general long-range reasoning.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Editing pipelines slowly erode voice through cumulative small changes that evade single-step checks.
records.description: Failure Mode candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Human vs AI discrimination – evaluate mixed corpus using discriminator_human_like_v1 and llm_judge_human_like_pairwise_v2; assert AUC and Elo within target ranges.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Narrative coherence – run multi_constraint_story_benchmark_v1 with story_state_consistency_checker_v1; verify constraint satisfaction and low contradiction rate.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Dialogue realism – evaluate multi_turn_reference_dialogue_set_v1 with dialogue_automatic_metric_suite_v2 and human_dialogue_realism_rubric_v1 alignment checks.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style consistency – compute style_consistency_metric_v2 over voice_locked_story_suite_v1 across chapters; assert drift within predefined thresholds.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Voice preservation after editing – measure voice_preservation_after_edit_v1 and semantic fidelity on edited_pairs_voice_labelled_v1; compare to human labels.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Template echo – run template_echo_detector_v1 on template_echo_challenge_set_v1; expect high recall of seeded template echoes with controlled false-positive rate.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Prompt sensitivity – apply prompt_sensitivity_metric_v2 to prompt_variant_family_suite_v1 for all evaluators; ensure sensitivity scores below ceiling per task.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Cross-run stability – compute cross_run_stability_metric_v1 on stability_reference_corpus_v1 under repeated runs; check both stability and correctness vs references.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Memory – evaluate long_range_memory_benchmark_metric_v1 on multi_distance_memory_suite_v1; derive retention curves and detect interference-related collapses.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Integrated pipeline – run full narrative generation, editing, and evaluation chain on mixed benchmark fixtures; ensure no critical validators fail and all scores meet release criteria.
records.description: Test Case candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Which dimension do you want specified first for concrete schema design: validators, benchmarks, or style/voice encoders?
records.description: Library entry candidate extracted from cadence_library.
records.notes: Direct library extraction; preserve as candidate only, not production library truth.

cadence_library: Which dimension do you want specified first for concrete schema design: validators, benchmarks, or style/voice encoders?

names: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
